items.situation: two friends recommending a detective TV series to each other

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Have you started that new detective series everyone's talking about? I finished the whole first season last night.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Not yet, honestly. I'm a little burned out on crime shows lately.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: I get that, but this one's different. It's really about the two sisters, not the case.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Huh, so it's more of a character drama?

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Exactly. The mystery's almost background — you'd probably love the writing.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Okay, you've sold me.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Just don't read anything online first. That ending twist got spoiled for half my class.

questions.stem: Why is the woman talking to the man?

options.A: To recommend a TV series to him
options.B: To ask him about a crime novel she just finished
options.C: To warn him about online spoilers
options.D: To complain that a series disappointed her

questions.explanation: 女生一直在向男生安利这部侦探剧，说它跟普通犯罪剧不同、写得好，是在推荐这部剧，故A正确。B错：对话谈的是一部电视剧而非小说（wrong_topic）。C错：提醒别看剧透只是结尾的次要一句，不是谈话主旨（too_narrow）。D错：她非常喜欢这部剧，并没有觉得失望，与事实相反（reversed_situation）。

questions.stem: What will the man most likely do?

options.A: Cancel all his other crime shows
options.B: Avoid the series like other crime shows
options.C: Start watching the series this weekend
options.D: Lend the woman a detective novel

questions.explanation: 男生说"你说服我了"，接受了女生的推荐，接下来最可能去看这部剧，故C正确。A错：对话没提到取消其他犯罪剧，属过度推断（over_inference）。B错：他本来因厌倦犯罪剧想回避，但已改变主意决定去看（rejected_option）。D错：借小说与对话无关，纯属无中生有（unrelated_next_step）。

items.situation: two friends coordinating a weekend beach trip

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: So are we still on for the beach this Saturday? I've looked forward to it all week.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Definitely. Although the tide chart says high tide hits around noon, so the sand gets narrow then.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Oh no, really?

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Yeah. We should head out early and claim a spot before the crowds arrive.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Good idea. If we leave by eight, we'll get parking near the north entrance too.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Perfect. I'll bring the cooler and grab ice on the way.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: And I'll pack sandwiches and the umbrella. Text me when you're leaving.

questions.stem: What are the speakers mainly discussing?

options.A: Which beach they should visit this coming Saturday
options.B: How to plan their Saturday beach trip
options.C: When high tide will reach the beach
options.D: Whether to cancel their beach trip

questions.explanation: 两人围绕周六去海滩的安排展开：几点出发、停车、谁带什么，主题是筹划这次海滩之行，故B正确。A错：他们从没讨论去哪个海滩，地点是既定的（wrong_topic）。C错：涨潮时间只是决定早出发的一个细节，不是主旨（too_narrow）。D错：两人都在积极准备，并没有要取消，与事实相反（reversed_situation）。

questions.stem: What will the man most likely do before leaving?

options.A: Reschedule the whole trip for Sunday morning
options.B: Wait until noon to avoid the crowds
options.C: Pack the sandwiches and beach umbrella himself
options.D: Get ice on his way there

questions.explanation: 男生说"我带冰盒，路上买冰"，所以出发前会顺路买冰，故D正确。A错：没人提改到周日，属过度推断（over_inference）。B错：他们决定要早出发避开人群，等到中午与之相反（rejected_option）。C错：带三明治和遮阳伞是女生的任务，张冠李戴（unrelated_next_step）。

items.situation: two students swapping music recommendations because one is bored of the same pop singers

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: I'm so bored of my playlist. It's the same three pop singers on repeat.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: I know that feeling. Have you tried any indie folk? There's a band called River Lantern.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: River Lantern?

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Yeah. They're mellow, lots of acoustic guitar. Their second album is perfect for studying.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: That actually sounds nice. Where can I listen to them?

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: They're on every streaming app. I'll send you the album link right now.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Great, thanks! I'll play it while I finish my essay tonight.

questions.stem: What does the man recommend to the woman?

options.A: A famous pop singer's new album

questions.explanation: 男生推荐了一支叫River Lantern的独立民谣乐队，还夸他们的第二张专辑适合学习，故C正确。A错：女生正是厌倦了流行歌手，男生推荐的不是流行歌手（wrong_detail）。B错：对话没有推荐某个学习歌单，只是说专辑适合学习（related_but_not_stated）。D错：从未提到现场音乐会（related_but_not_stated）。

questions.stem: What will the woman most likely do next?

options.A: Play the album while she studies
options.B: Replay her old pop playlist again
options.C: Go see River Lantern perform live
options.D: Start writing songs for her own band

questions.explanation: 女生说"我今晚写论文时放来听"，所以接下来会边学习边听这张专辑，故A正确。B错：她已经厌倦了旧的流行歌单，不会再重复听（rejected_option）。C错：看现场演出对话中毫无依据（unrelated_next_step）。D错：自己组乐队写歌远超对话内容，属过度推断（over_inference）。

items.situation: two friends deciding between joining the photography club and the intramural frisbee team

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: I finally have time for something fun this semester. I'm torn between the photography club and intramural frisbee.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Oh, nice. Does the photography club still meet on Thursday nights?

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Yeah, seven to nine in the arts building. But frisbee practice is the same slot.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: That's a tough clash.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: I know. Though the frisbee league is pretty casual — more about getting outside than winning.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Then start with photography, since you've wanted to learn editing for ages.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: You're right. I can always try frisbee in the spring.

questions.stem: When does the photography club meet?

options.A: Every weekend afternoon in the sports hall
options.B: Twice a week in the library
options.C: Friday nights in the arts building
options.D: Thursday nights in the arts building

questions.explanation: 女生说摄影社周四晚七到九点在艺术楼活动，故D正确。A错：地点和时间都错，那更像运动项目（wrong_detail）。B错：对话没提每周两次或在图书馆（related_but_not_stated）。C错：把周四说成周五，改动了关键的日子（wrong_detail）。

questions.stem: What will the woman most likely do this semester?

options.A: Quit both activities to focus on studies
options.B: Join the photography club this semester
options.C: Play on the frisbee team now
options.D: Sign up for a weekend photography trip

questions.explanation: 男生建议先参加摄影社，女生同意并说飞盘可以留到春季，所以本学期会先加入摄影社，故B正确。A错：她想找点乐子，不是放弃两者，属过度推断（over_inference）。C错：她明确把飞盘推迟到春季，现在不打（rejected_option）。D错：周末摄影出游对话从未提及（unrelated_next_step）。

items.situation: two students chatting about a pottery art class one of them took

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: How was that pottery class you signed up for? I've been curious about it.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Honestly, harder than I expected, but I loved it. We made our first bowls today.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Bowls already?

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Well, they're pretty lopsided, but the instructor says that's totally normal at the start.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: That's still impressive. Do you get to keep what you make?

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Yeah, once they're fired in the kiln next week. You should join the next session.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Maybe I will. I'll check if there are any spots left.

questions.stem: What did the man make in class today?
questions.explanation: 男生说他们今天做了第一批碗，故A正确。B错：他做的是碗不是彩绘盘子，改动了关键事物（wrong_detail）。C错：大花瓶对话中没有提到（related_but_not_stated）。D错：花园雕塑同样从未出现（related_but_not_stated）。

questions.stem: What will the woman most likely do next?

options.A: Sign up for the advanced pottery course
options.B: Decide the class isn't for her
options.C: Check whether spots remain in the class
options.D: Buy her own pottery wheel today

questions.explanation: 女生说"也许我会去，我去看看还有没有名额"，所以接下来会去查是否还有空位，故C正确。A错：她是刚起步的新手，报高级班属过度推断（over_inference）。B错：她表现出兴趣，觉得课程不适合自己与之相反（rejected_option）。D错：买陶轮对话中毫无依据（unrelated_next_step）。
